title: No cache-down degradation — Redis failure causes service 500
expected_feedback: Critical: When Redis is unreachable, this function returns an error directly — meaning a Redis outage takes down the order service entirely. Redis is a cache, not the source of truth. Degradation path must exist: (1) on cache error, fall through to database query (with rate limiting to prevent DB overload), (2) optionally serve from local in-process cache if available, (3) return a degraded but functional response rather than 500. Cache unavailability should degrade performance, not availability.
